name: Alert
description: A persistent inline message that communicates status or guidance — stays visible until the condition changes or the user dismisses it

anatomy.title: Optional heading that summarises the situation
anatomy.actions: Optional action buttons (e.g. Retry, Go to settings)
anatomy.dismissButton: Optional dismiss control (not present when alert is critical)

dismissed.description: Alert has been manually dismissed (not present in DOM)

keyboard.Tab: Moves focus to actions or dismiss button within the alert
keyboard.Escape: Dismisses the alert if it is dismissible

a11y.labelStrategy: description-text-is-accessible — if icon-only, aria-label on root required

variants.info: Neutral guidance or contextual information — role=status
variants.success: Confirmation that an operation succeeded — role=status
variants.warning: Caution — user should act but is not blocked — role=alert

description.description: The full alert message — must be understandable without the title

title.description: Short heading that summarises the situation

actions.description: One or two action buttons — keep to a maximum of two

icon.description: Semantic icon — strongly recommended for all variants
